title: How to Ruin Love: The Proposal | Official Trailer | Netflix
text:
Cheers to us. Cheers to us. You poisoned me. And cut. That is a picture wrap
for Sinful Seductions. But it's bound to happen. What are we waiting for? Let's get married. I'm not getting married anytime soon. Right. Yeah. Will you marry me? You bastard! My boyfriend proposing to my best friend. Yoh. I planned the surprise proposal for you. It's a good thing that didn't happen. Three years of this relationship, gone. -We can fix this.
-No. I'm gonna have to bring my family. We need to be stronger together right now. Your son has poisoned my daughter. Am I crazy? Just a little bit. Love isn't perfect. You fight for it. We are with you. Thank goodness
it's not our family this year.
